title: galium lanceolatum
intro: Galium lanceolatum, also known as narrow-leaved bedstraw, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Galium lanceolatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating urinary tract issues and other conditions. Galium lanceolatum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
